description: These 12-inch heart-shaped wire wreath frame is the perfect way to create a beautiful and unique floral wreath. The sturdy copper wire is easy to work with and can be bent into any shape you desire. The heart shape makes it perfect for Valentine's Day, weddings, or any other special occasion. To create your wreath, simply start by adding your favorite flowers, greenery, or other decorative materials to the wire frame. You can use real flowers, artificial flowers, or a combination of both. Once you have added your desired materials, simply secure them in place with florist wire or hot glue. This wreath frame is also a great way to create a memorial wreath. Simply add your loved one's favorite flowers or mementos to the frame to create a lasting tribute. No matter what occasion you are decorating for, this heart-shaped wire wreath frame is the perfect way to add a touch of romance and elegance.
